source: tokens.motion — evidence-derived (per-selector CSS motion audit); the full table ships as motion-audit.yaml

micro.role: hover washes on dense option lists (select/multi-select .option background .1s)

state.role: THE state tier — color/background-color/border state shifts (nav links, accordion triggers, button ink, language items)

move.role: small transforms + fades (chevron rotate .2s, accordion panel height .2s, opacity fades, skip-link slide)

collapse.role: structural collapse + hover-out exits (footer group grid-rows .25s, menu toggle bars, --zora-btn-duration-hover-out .25s, modal popupIn)

reveal.role: panel/menu reveals + hover-in enters (nav desktopPanel opacity/transform .3s, nav entry-card grid-rows .3s, --zora-btn-duration-hover-in .3s, modal backdropIn)

elevation.role: card hover plate (testimonial card ::before background/box-shadow/bottom .5s — the tint+shadow wash)

expressive.role: large hover card reveals (image-grid link row height/margin/opacity .8s + image zoom .8s — always paired with the expo-out curve)

easings.use: EXPRESSIVE expo-out — reserved for the 800ms card reveals
browser default on the short state tier (most 150/200ms transitions leave easing unspecified) + 3 explicit uses

signatureMoves.name: cta-arrow-swap
signatureMoves.move: CTA arrow icon exits right by --zora-btn-arrow-travel (16px) fading out, then re-enters from the left (opacity swap at the 45%/45.1% keyframes); hover-in 300ms enter curve, hover-out 250ms exit curve

signatureMoves.name: marquee-scroll
signatureMoves.move: logo strip track scrolls continuously left by half its doubled width (translateX(var(--sp-offset,-50%))), linear, infinite
signatureMoves.timing: duration is JS-set via --sp-duration (CSS fallback 0s) — see motion-audit jsTimingNotes; static capture renders the strip paused

measured.note: one full -50% loop of the doubled track = 36s as computed by the site's own JS at 1440

signatureMoves.name: mega-menu-reveal
signatureMoves.move: nav dropdown panel fades+slides open (opacity/transform/visibility) while entry-card images and descriptions unfold via grid-template-rows
signatureMoves.timing: 300ms across panel, card image and description (no easing declared — browser ease)

signatureMoves.name: hover-card-reveal
signatureMoves.move: work-culture image cards: hidden link row slides open (height/margin-top/opacity) while the image well shrinks and the image zooms — the brand's most expressive move

signatureMoves.name: card-elevation-wash
signatureMoves.move: testimonial cards raise a ::before plate on hover: surface tint to #f6f7f8 + 0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.08) shadow + plate extends 8px past the bottom edge

signatureMoves.name: modal-pop
signatureMoves.move: form modal: backdrop fades in; popup scales .97→1 while translating 8px up (sheet evidence only — no modal renders on the captured page)

signatureMoves.name: accordion-state-shift
signatureMoves.move: feature accordion: trigger background/ink/corner-rounding shift on the state tier, chevron rotates on the move tier, panel height animates on the move tier

reducedMotion.role: 12 prefers-reduced-motion rules measured in the fresh sheet

scrollReveal.trigger: IntersectionObserver, ~8% viewport inset, small per-item stagger

link.hoverColorNote: measured on a DARK surface — apply ONLY on dark/inverse surfaces; on light surfaces hover stays the surface ink (WCAG: the accent is a 1.3:1 contrast failure on the light canvas — see quality/anti-ai-slop.md AS-10)

imageParallax.mechanism: GSAP ScrollTrigger scrub; masked wrapper (.c-image-mask, overflow:hidden, wraps ONLY the img, never a caption); img scale(1.12) + yPercent pan; hero overlap pair moves at differential rates (0.4x / 1.2x); prefers-reduced-motion disables everything
